name: AtoZ Bar Wine & Brasserie
description: An intimate brasserie with a sommelier-led wine program and seasonal small plates from a wood-fired hearth.

name: Bosa Restaurant
description: A tasting-menu journey through coastal South Asia, reimagined with modern technique and theatre.

name: Bodega All Day Dining
description: A laid-back all-day cafe pouring single-origin coffee in the morning and natural wine after dark.

name: Lakers By AtoZ
description: A breezy lakeside pavilion known for whole grilled fish, crudo, and gin-forward sundowners.

name: Redhare
description: A dimly lit gastropub with a 40-strong cocktail list and a kitchen that takes pub food seriously.

name: District5
description: A warehouse dining room where Mediterranean, East Asian, and Latin American ideas share the pass.

name: Infinity
description: A rooftop counter with a single nightly tasting menu, an open kitchen, and an unbroken city skyline.

name: Oombee
description: A loud, joyful canteen pulling from Bangkok, Saigon, Penang and Seoul — eat with your hands.

name: Shiraz
description: A sun-soaked kitchen built around saffron, charcoal, and shareable platters from the Levant to Esfahan.
